title: Dasystephana boissieri
taxonomy: Dasystephana boissieri is classified within the family Compositae, commonly known as the aster or sunflower family. This family includes a wide range of flowering plants, often characterized by their composite inflorescence. Further classification of Dasystephana boissieri places it within the subfamily Heliantoideae, which is a subgroup of the family Compositae. Within the subfamily Heliantoideae, Dasystephana boissieri belongs to the tribe Heliantheae, a group of flowering plants known for their daisy-like flowers. The exact classification of Dasystephana boissieri may still be subject to revision as new research and discoveries are made.
